nodes.label: ConnectTimeout is a connection error, not a delivery-ambiguous timeout.
ReadTimeout is NOT retried because the request may have reached         the ser
ConnectTimeout is safe to retry — the connection was never established.
SendResult.retryable=True should trigger retry even if error string doesn't matc
If error switches from network to formatting mid-retry, fall through to plain-te
If the notice itself throws, _send_with_retry should not raise.
